statement: In every magma, Equation 754 (`x = y * (z * ((x * w) * z))`) implies Equation 2134 (`x = ((y * y) * y) * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0691
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op x w) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) y) (op x x))
